description_long: This is a modern apartment complex consisting of three distinct rectangular buildings arranged around a central open courtyard. Each building features flat roofs, large windows, and multiple balconies, with a mix of white and brown exterior finishes. The complex is set on a sloped terrain, with retaining walls and landscaped green areas surrounding the buildings. There are dedicated parking lots adjacent to the buildings, accessible by a paved driveway that curves around the property. The central courtyard appears to be a communal space, possibly for recreation or gathering. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, symmetry, and functional outdoor spaces.
description: A modern apartment complex with three rectangular buildings, flat roofs, large windows, balconies, and a central courtyard, surrounded by parking and landscaped areas.
description_view_0: View 0 shows the complex from above and at an angle, highlighting the central courtyard, the three buildings, and the surrounding green areas and parking lot.
description_view_1: View 1 presents the rear and side elevations, emphasizing the sloped terrain and the retaining walls supporting the buildings.
description_view_2: View 2 focuses on the parking lot and the main driveway, with the buildings arranged around the central open space.
description_view_3: View 3 provides a direct look at the parking area and the front facades of the buildings, showing the main entrances and balconies.
attribute_window_arrangement: The windows are symmetrically arranged in vertical and horizontal rows, with consistent spacing and alignment across all building facades, contributing to a balanced and modern appearance.
